rows.label: qst650118_msg0001
rows.name:
Master Archsage order me to serve
refreshments to friends fighting hard
and burning mad calories.

rows.label: qst650118_msg0002
rows.name:
I been in employ of Nopon Archsage for
countless moons, and know every single
dish from every single universe!

rows.label: qst650118_msg0004
rows.name:
But some so delicious need warnings,
so for friends' sake, will only offer
Alst cuisines.

rows.label: qst650118_msg0005
rows.name:
Also, I buy back unwanted articles.
Very usefulpon that way.
